title: Minecart TNT Fix
description: Fixes the randomization of TNT blast power in minecarts, hard setting it to 1.5
body:
Fixes an issue where Minecart TNTs would randomize their BONUS blast power based on their velocity, adding a hard cap of 1.5 to this.

This was a request by @xarbidarb on the Fabric Discord, and I took up the challenge.
